explanation: I entered the seeded username for the local demo account.
I entered the shared seeded password for the example user.
I signed in so the authenticated transaction feeds can load.
I switched to the personal feed so the signed-in user's own transactions are visible.
I opened the seeded pending request detail so I can add a comment to it.
I entered a distinctive comment so the detail and feed states can be verified later.
I submitted the comment from the transaction detail view.
I returned to the transaction feeds so I can verify the updated comment count from another view.
I switched back to the personal feed to verify the updated request row there.

action.summary: I added a comment to the seeded pending request and verified the updated comment count from the personal feed.

explanation: The updated request row is visible in the personal feed now, so I am ending the task.
